RE-NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES FROM DEFTS AND TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FROM SECURITY PACIFIC FINANCIAL; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION, SEPARATE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAWROCKI, MATT HEARING SET FOR JAN-31-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES FROM DEFENDANTS SECURITY PACIFIC FINANCIAL, MICHAEL ROGALLA, AND DOYLE GLASS; AND TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FROM SECURITY PACIFIC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANTS' FAILURE TO RESPOND FULLY WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,812.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND OF CROSS-COMPLAINT AS TO ENTIRE ACTION.
